'''Gru'um Ropple''' was an associate of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]].

==Biography==
During a visit to [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] with [[Miramba]]—a [[Synthskin/Legends|synthskin]]-covered [[Droid/Legends|droid]]—[[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]] framed them both by planting a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] on Gru'um, thus making it seem as if they'd broken the no-weapons rule in his palace. Thus, Gru'um and Miramba were arrested.

While in his cell, he and Miramba let loose a pack of [[frecker]]s in an attempt to kill everyone and thus be able to attain freedom. Unfortunately for them, Bib and several of Jabba's other minions managed to kill all of the freckers.

{{Char-stub}}
